translated: And...
I touched on that, but wait, how far did I get?
Right, I talked about my favorite scenes.
And I mentioned the achievement of their voices syncing up for the Grand Fleur commercial.
Yeah, that's right.
So...
In this story, when Shizuku was working on Grand Fleur,
and she wanted to improve...
She saw Hagiyama-chan's performance,
and seeing her strength made her realize, "This is what I'm missing!"
There was that scene where she finally found it.
I actually really empathized with Shizuku in that moment.
When I'm doing my own work and activities,
there are so many times when I'm faced with what I'm lacking.
I'm aware that I'm missing something, and I run right into that wall,
but as for what specifically I should do to grasp that missing piece,
I just don't know.
I seriously have no idea.
Honestly, I could probably call this the main challenge of my life.
I'm very blessed with my environment, and the people around me
are all such charming, cool, and wonderful people.
Because of that, I see them having things that I don't have.
That's how it is.
In other words...
They look so radiant, and they possess things I lack.
When I'm struggling in those moments,
I get this image of myself struggling in the deep sea where I can't see any light or the path ahead.
It's really painful.
It's like no matter what I do, it backfires,
or I just can't get any results.
